comments.author: chatgpt-codex-connector
comments.body:
Codex usage limits have been reached for code reviews. Please check with the admins of this repo to increase the limits by adding credits.
Credits must be used to enable repository wide code reviews.

comments.author: Flink-ddd
comments.body: Hi @Gaohan123 , the remaining CI failure (KeyError: 'engine_extras' in test_config_factory.py) seems completely unrelated to my PR. My changes only touch the state machine logic in async_omni.py, while this error is crashing on YAML config parsing for voxcpm2. It looks like a recent upstream issue on main. The PR is ready for review, thanks!
